query:
INSERT INTO radio_channels (stationId, name, genre, frequency, status, currentListeners, totalListeners, streamUrl, metadata) VALUES
(870003, 'SQUADD Coalition Radio', 'Empowerment & Talk', '432', 'active', 0, 0, 'https://tunein.cdnstream1.com/2868_96.mp3', '{"category":"community","description":"SQUADD Coalition programming — Sisters Questing Unapologetically After Divine Destiny.","icon":"Earth","channelId":"ch-052"}'),
